creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://svn.freebsd.org/base/head/etc/rc.d/mroute6d references /usr/local/sbin/pim6dd , which is a part of net/mcast-tools . The rc.d script should be moved to the port and removed from the base system as it's a more logical location for the script.

Once the script is added to the port, I'll remove it from the base system.
